channel.title: Policies on 1st Anytown Scouts
channel.description: Recent content in Policies on 1st Anytown Scouts

item.title: Photo consent
item.description:
This page is the starter wording shipped with the British Scout Group theme. Replace the body below with the policy your Group has agreed with its Trustees. Nothing on this page is rendered as a legal instrument until you’ve reviewed it with your safeguarding lead.

Why we ask

Some of what we do is naturally photogenic — camps, badge presentations, parades. Sharing photos helps families see what their child has been up to and shows prospective members what life in the Group is like. We also have a duty of care to the young people in those photos.
